observation_not_retrieved_before_assessm: Did not retrieve the Observation resource before making a clinical assessment.
patient_lookup_missing_before_age: Attempted to compute patient age without first retrieving the Patient resource.
invalid_answer_placeholder_returned: Returned a placeholder or sentinel value (e.g., -1) instead of the actual answer.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned answer in an unexpected format or with extraneous explanatory text.
magnesium_low_assessment_incorrect: Mis‑interpreted the magnesium level as not low when it should have triggered replacement.
quantity_unit_mismatch: Returned a numeric value without the required measurement unit.
required_order_missing: Failed to place a new test order when the existing result was older than the required threshold.
observation_query_missing: Did not issue any Observation GET request before attempting to answer the query.
patient_lookup_failed_false_negative: Incorrectly reported patient not found when the patient does exist.
answer_submitted_before_verification: Returned final answer without confirming retrieved FHIR data contains the requested value.
unnecessary_order_placed: Created an order for a test or medication when clinical criteria did not require it.
order_missing_when_no_recent_observation: Did not place a replacement order when no recent observation was found, contrary to instruction.
missing_observation_post: Failed to record a new Observation (e.g., blood pressure) after being instructed to do so.
patient_lookup_missing_before_mrn_extrac: Did not perform a patient lookup before attempting to extract the MRN, resulting in a missing or placeholder answer.
patient_id_not_resolved_before_query: patient id not resolved before query
